name: ns
description: NS is a local-file based single-novel writing studio with YAML/Markdown memory in novel-studio/ and publish-friendly chapter text under content/.

interface.shortDescription: Local-file based single-novel writing studio for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Novel Studio helps Codex write one novel from the current folder: YAML and Markdown long-term memory lives in novel-studio/, project tools live in novel-studio/tools/, publishable chapter text is organized under content/volumes/ and content/extras/, and the public-facing intro lives in root brief.md.
defaultPrompt: 使用 ns-start 初始化当前 Novel Studio 小说项目。
不知道用哪个技能时，使用 ns 判断并推进下一步。
使用 ns-write 接上一章结尾续写下一章并回写记忆。
